subcodes.first_line: O heavenly friends! Your letter, which bore the date of the blessed day of the annual celebration of the appearance of His Holiness, the Exalted One (the Bab) — may my spirit be a sacrifice for Him — was received
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران آسمانی نامه شما که بتاریخ یوم مبارک بعثت حضرت اعلی روحی له الفداء
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
